summary: Platform Services is a Go monorepo containing three backend binaries: api-server (HTTP API gateway), worker (background job processor), and migrate (database schema migration tool). All three share internal/ packages for database access, configuration, and queue management. Tests are colocated with source (_test.go files) and run via a Makefile target that wraps go test with coverage flags.

entrypoints.description: HTTP API server main; listens on :8080 (or PORT env), provides /health endpoint
Background worker main; polls queue for tasks and executes them in a loop
Database migration CLI; subcommands up/down/status for schema management

key_directories.role: shared configuration loading from environment variables
